title: Sing a Song♪流れる『第2の謎』

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, my tummy's so happy! I'm getting sleepy now.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, we have been running around a lot, so I'm feeling a bit sleepy
too. But we've still got a long ways to go!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Who would've thought we'd be served lunch during the audition? I
appreciate Ms. Beauty's thoughtfulness.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"You can't have beauty without a healthy diet!" I'm pretty picky about
what I eat, so I couldn't agree more! ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now, to all my lovely gems gathered in this hall—please enjoy a
one-hour lunch break on me!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
After all, you can't have beauty without a healthy diet! Eat up, so you
can keep on showing me your beauty in the afternoon!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
You won't be allowed to leave the hall during this time, but feel free
to discuss the riddle you're on with your team. Time is beauty, as they
say!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
As of now, eighty percent of teams have solved the first
riddle—what's this? I'm hearing that some teams have solved the
second riddle already!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Which means, it's time for me to explain the final riddle! In the last
round, every team will receive the same riddle to solve.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
For the sake of fairness, each team will only get one attempt to solve
this riddle. You'll get ten minutes exactly, so remember to watch the
clock.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Which of you gems will solve the final riddle and get to propose to
your wedding dress? I can hardly wait! ☆

text_block_list.name: Positive Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
So some teams are already past the second riddle... Still, we can't
give up now! We've gotta show Ms. Beauty our grit!

text_block_list.name: Insecure Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Usually, I freeze up under pressure... but this audition will be
different!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: (Everyone... feels the same way Curren does...)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: (They have a part of themselves they want to show off...)

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Earth to Fine. Shouldn't we get to cracking that riddle?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Right, of course! My apologies for spacing out just now.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: First things first, let me read the riddle aloud again.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
"Lift your gaze to the room containing every number, for treasure
hides where the beholder lies. The legend begins on your marks."

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: "Get set, go!"

text_block_list.name: Rice and Urara
text_block_list.text: "Oooh! Umadacchi! Oooh!"

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: "Umapyoi"—wait, ahhh! Sorry! The song's just so catchy!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Actually, that's a great idea! Rice, Urara, could you pick up from
where you left off? ♪

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Y-you want me to sing? Um... "Horsegirl Horsegirl umya unya—3, 2, 1,
fight!"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: If you add up the three, two, and one... you get six!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Maybe the part of the riddle about "containing every number" means
adding up all the digits in the song?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If you think about it, "Umapyoi Legend" has a bunch of digits in its
lyrics. ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I get it now! In that case, I'll sing the whole song! "1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4, 5!"

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! Slow down, Urara! Let's see, one plus two... then three plus
four?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
In the lyrics, "1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4, 5," the "4, 5" portion sticks out
noticeably from the first three placings. Perhaps we don't need to add
them up?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I see, so there's a trick to it. Well then, why don't we have you three
sing the rest of the song together?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Just to be clear, Curren and I will be adding the numbers while you
three handle the lyrics. We'll cross-check our answers after.

text_block_list.name: Curren and Ikuno
text_block_list.text: The answer is room 109!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, nice! ♪ By the way, solving this riddle sure felt like a team
effort, didn't it?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Like, we figured out the riddle thanks to Urara and Rice singing...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
And Fine's photographic memory of the written lyrics saved us from
falling for the riddle's trick and miscounting.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Don't forget Ikuno's brilliant suggestion of cross-checking the
calculations! ...Hehe, we've come together quite nicely as a team. ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
"My splendorous gemstones! It's about time for the afternoon
riddle-solving to begin! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I'm gonna run to the bathroom real quick! I'll catch up later, so go
ahead without me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-okay! ...Remember to watch where you're going!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Gotta go! Gotta hurry! Can't fall behind! Everyone's off to room
109! ♪

text_block_list.name: Elderly Guest
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, young lady... Sorry to bother you.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Guest
text_block_list.text:
Might you know where the annex is? I'm afraid I've lost my way back
to my room.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! You're lost? Don't worry—I'll take you to your room!
